title: Boost Productivity with Tag to Action! 🚀

posts.author: kessi (Kessi A)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone!

Have you tried Tag to Action yet? This app is a real game-changer for automating your tasks.

By simply using tags, Tag to Action streamlines how you manage and update tasks, making your workflow smoother than ever. Here is what you can do with our app:

Use any tag such as “tmr” or “team” to set the recurrence of the task and notify the team members

Use tags to initiate workflows or send triggers, for example sending slack notifications just by using the tag “slack”

To keep the board organized, you can remove the tags automatically from the item name

Be creative and see how “Tag to Action” transforms your workflow. It’s not just about doing things faster; it’s about doing them smarter🧠

Check out this video for a detailed explanation on how to use Tag to Action
